channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Rubbish scattered everywhere, 26th April
item.description:
Absolute filth all over the pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Green Lanes, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pen tags and a flyposter on the black CCTV mast base fronting 7, Central Parade, High St, Penge, 26th April
item.description:
Pen tags and a flyposter on the black CCTV mast base fronting 7, Central Parade, High St, Penge
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): High Street, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Single mattress dumped / propped up next to the litter bin approximately fronting 209, High St, Penge., 26th April
item.description:
Single mattress dumped / propped up next to the litter bin approximately fronting 209, High St, Penge. Seen about 8.45pm Sat 25/4/26
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 205, High Street, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of pot holes across Main Road, 25th April
item.description:
Terrible road conditions. All across the main road. Busy road near the fire station/church
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 167, Main Road, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street Lamp not working, 25th April
item.description:
The lamp outside 9 & 11 Hollingworth Eoad is not working again. There is clearly something wrong with it as it was previously reported and then suddenly started working again when someone came to check it. The same thing happened about a year ago and it took over 3 visits to get it resolved. Please don’t mark the issue as ‘no fault found’ as this lampkis NOT working correctly.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hollingworth Road, Petts Wood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped, 25th April
item.description:
Fly tipped bed frame

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 54, Willow Way, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Human faeces in Communal Ground Floor Stairwell, 25th April
item.description:
Someone has defecated in our building - Block A Arnold Estate 1-30. Ground floor hallway area at Jamaica Road communal entrance. Please clean asap. Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Jamaica Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly-tipping, 25th April
item.description:
Pile of discarded construction materials (boards and metal framing) dumped on the pavement.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wadding Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped tyres, 25th April
item.description:
Tyres have been flytipped on the street. Please can they be cleared. Thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 307, Croxted Road, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing litter bin, 25th April
item.description:
Bin full and overflowing Outside Sainsbury’s, corner of Sidney Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 185, Beckenham Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing bins, 25th April
item.description:
2 x overflowing public bins. One by bustop BC, outside Meat Mood and the other nearby outside the Kebab House on the corner. ///gifted.piano.cheese

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 159-175, Beckenham Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing litter bin, 25th April
item.description:
///served.dozed.legend Bin overflowing and litter around surrounding area

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 34, Beckenham Road, Beckenham, Greater London

item.title: Fly tipped couch attracting disorderly behaviour, 25th April
item.description:
Couch has been fly tipped near the northpole bar, which patrons are congregating on and behaving in a drunk and disorderly behaviour.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Greenwich High Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Very large pothole on speedbump, 25th April
item.description:
Big and deep pothole on a speed bump. Hard to see last minute, I couldn’t swerve on my bike and burst my back tyre on impact.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): College Road, Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lime Hire bikes Parked front on a Fire Exit., 25th April
item.description:
Lime Hire bikes Parked front on a Fire Exit. Blocking of the Fire exit of M&Ms on Leicester Street

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3, Leicester Street, Covent Garden, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Cars, 25th April
item.description:
Cars taking up multiple spaces that never move. Been at least a year. Dirty and abandoned. Constant parking wars on this road
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Broadoak Avenue, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bed base fly tipped, 25th April
item.description:
It's quite large and in the way of the pavement
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Clive Road, Lessness Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Foot path enclosed by a neighbour, 25th April
item.description:
It came to my attention that according to land maps theres should be a foot path between hillside road and pembroke close. Yet its enclosed by houses 22 and 24. The path seperared by double fence meaning the actual gardens and the path are seperated and its impossibile to acces the path from the gardens. Its severely overgrown with the vegetation and is completely unkept. Rats now live there because of the mess amount. The house 22 claims its their land, however according to your maps and the layout tells a different story. If that is the foot path id like it to be reopened if not id like to know how i can hold the owner of the land responsible for their overgrown vegetation to clean it up as its affecting my property.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hillside, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole, 25th April
item.description:
Pothole and damaged road surface next to double red lines near a manhole cover.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Black Prince Road, Vauxhall, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lamp has failed again, 25th April
item.description:
Barely lit again.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lincoln Green Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
